title: Blue Ancient Debris
description: The Nether Update has brought about many exciting changes, like Netherite, the new material that is stronger than diamonds. You hop in your Nether portal, dig down to y 15, and start TNT-ing everything in sight.
body: The Nether Update has brought about many exciting changes, like Netherite, the new material that is stronger than diamonds. You hop in your Nether portal, dig down to y 15, and start TNT-ing everything in sight. There's just one problem, Ancient Debris blend in with literally every other block in the Nether. I have the solution. Lovingly designed in 5 minutes, this texture pack makes Ancient Debris a blue, which sharply contrasts the shades of red in the Nether. Never miss an Ancient Debris again!
